_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Skill in identifying and investigating "abnormal" control system operations based on what specific mission/business functions look like.
reference_document_element_description: Skill in designing human oversight mechanisms for AI-assisted decision-making, including escalation triggers, override procedures, human-in-the-loop protocols, and meaningful human control verification.
comments: DCWF ksa intersects with WIDAI AG domain. AG-S-007 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: TF-A-002 (TF, cosine: 0.511), RC-T-008 (RC, cosine: 0.506).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 3.3/10 (raw 0.332). Shared vocabulary: [control, skill]. DCWF-only terms [abnormal, based, business, functions, identifying, investigating] vs WIDAI-only terms [ai, assisted, decision, designing, escalation, human] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.861 (P=0.864, R=0.858). Balanced P/R — the 17-word DCWF element and 21-word WIDAI KSA cover each other's token-level semantic content symmetrically.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: contradiction-dominant (55.0%). Despite 'Intersects with' classification, the model detects semantic tension between "Skill in identifying and investigating "abnormal" control system operations base" and "Skill in designing human oversight mechanisms for AI-assisted decision-making, i". Indicates these concepts operate in adjacent but distinct professional domains — shared vocabulary, different application context.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.542 > STS 0.332 (gap +0.209). Independent encoding finds more similarity than cross-attention. Shared surface terms [control, skill] inflate the bi-encoder, but cross-attention detects semantic divergence beneath the vocabulary overlap.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 10.8%. Shared tokens: [control, skill]. DCWF-only: [abnormal, based, business, functions, identifying, investigating]. WIDAI-only: [ai, assisted, decision, designing, escalation, human].
